para_trans: 02. Appointment of office bearers and members appointed to the Board of Bhoodan as mentioned above.
The order has been published in the Government Gazette and a copy of the same is attached.
Allocation of Bhoodan land as per the provisions of Madhya Pradesh Bhoodan Yajna Act, 1953 or
Before finalising the land deal, the land grant board will be required to obtain prior approval from the government.
This Government decision is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
